question_text: Implement a JSON Schema validator from scratch that supports: type validation (string, number, integer, boolean, array, object, null), required fields, minimum/maximum for numbers, minLength/maxLength

gpt54.brief_justification: Response B is also incomplete, but it covers more of the requested validator design and remains more substantial overall. Response A is truncated before the array validation implementation and therefore fails to deliver the requested solution.

gemini.brief_justification: Both responses were truncated, but Response B managed to implement almost all the requested features before cutting off, whereas Response A spent too much time on boilerplate and implemented very few of the actual validation rules.

deepseek.brief_justification: Response A is more complete, correct, and usable, with a fully implemented validator and clear examples. Response B is incomplete and contains syntax errors.
